title: Traditional Platforms vs Unchained Commerce for Payment Solutions That Actually Work for Nigerian Freelancers
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Creators in Nigeria, Pakistan, Ghana, Bangladesh, and dozens of other countries cannot use the platforms everyone else takes for granted. This changes that.

content.text: As a Nigerian freelancer, you've put your heart and soul into creating a digital product, only to be blocked from collecting payment by traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe, which don't support your country or have stringent requirements that are hard to meet, leaving you wondering how to sell your product globally without restrictions, this is a frustrating experience that many digital creators in Africa and other restricted countries face, with their work being overlooked due to payment limitations, but there is a solution that can help you overcome these obstacles and start selling your digital products worldwide
What You Are Actually Comparing

When comparing traditional platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip to Unchained Commerce, it's essential to consider the restrictions and limitations imposed by these platforms, such as geographic restrictions, banking limitations, and KYC requirements, which can prevent digital creators in Nigeria and other restricted countries from selling their products globally, whereas Unchained Commerce offers a crypto-native infrastructure that allows for global access and payment solutions without these restrictions
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like PayPal and Stripe often break down for digital creators in Nigeria and other restricted countries due to their restrictive policies and requirements, which can lead to account suspensions, payment delays, and even loss of sales, furthermore, these platforms often charge high fees and have limited payment options, making it difficult for creators to receive international payments for their digital products
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, like the one offered by Unchained Commerce, does things differently by providing a decentralized and global payment solution that allows digital creators to sell their products without restrictions, with the use of cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum, creators can receive payments from anywhere in the world, without the need for traditional banking systems or intermediaries, this infrastructure also provides instant automated delivery, global access, and fully automated payment verification
Traditional payment platforms like PayPal and Stripe are not designed to support digital creators in restricted countries, leaving them without a reliable way to receive international payments
The Real Cost Difference

The real cost difference between traditional platforms and Unchained Commerce lies in the fees and restrictions imposed by these platforms, traditional platforms often charge high fees, ranging from 5-10% per transaction, whereas Unchained Commerce offers a one-time payment for its products, such as the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard, which provides a more cost-effective solution for digital creators, additionally, Unchained Commerce does not charge any subscription fees, providing lifetime access to its products
Which One to Use and Why

For digital creators in Nigeria and other restricted countries, Unchained Commerce is the better choice due to its crypto-native infrastructure, global access, and payment solutions without restrictions, with Unchained Commerce, creators can sell their digital products worldwide, without the need for traditional banking systems or intermediaries, and receive payments in cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum, this provides a more secure, transparent, and cost-effective solution for creators
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

As a digital creator in Nigeria, you can sell your products globally without restrictions by using a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce, which provides a decentralized and global payment solution, allowing you to receive payments from anywhere in the world, without the need for traditional banking systems or intermediaries, this means you can sell ebooks, courses, and other digital products from Africa to the world, and receive international payments for your work, whether you are in Pakistan, Bangladesh, or any other restricted country, Unchained Commerce has a solution that can help you overcome payment limitations and start selling your digital products worldwide

Crypto-native infrastructure provides a decentralized and global payment solution that allows digital creators to sell their products without restrictions, and receive payments from anywhere in the world
Related Topics Worth Reading

Selling digital products from Africa or other restricted countries requires a deep understanding of the challenges and limitations imposed by traditional platforms, however, with the rise of crypto-native infrastructure and global payment solutions, creators can now overcome these obstacles and start selling their products worldwide, whether it's selling ebooks, courses, or software, Unchained Commerce provides a solution that can help creators in Nigeria and other restricted countries to sell their digital products globally, without restrictions
Your Launch Checklist — No Platform Permission Required

Before launching your digital product store, make sure you have a solid plan in place, start by setting up your Core Shop Engine, which will provide you with a backend for automated delivery and payment verification, then integrate Web3 Wallet Connect to enable multi-chain QR codes and live price feeds, and finally, set up your Admin Dashboard to track transactions and manage orders, with these tools in place, you'll be able to sell your digital products worldwide, without restrictions, and receive payments in cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum, make sure to test your store thoroughly before launch, and have a plan in place for customer support and marketing

With Unchained Commerce, success looks like being able to sell your digital products worldwide, without restrictions, and receiving payments in cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum, all while maintaining control over your store and your finances
Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
